---
title: "Incidence estimates for Takayasu arteritis in England by Demographic Group: a sensitivity analysis where individuals with unknown ethnicity were assumed to be White"
author: "SJ Lax"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
  pdf_document: default
---

### Setup

```{r setup}
#install packages at first use
#install.packages("tidyverse", repos = "https://packages.sde.digital.nhs.uk/repository/cran-mirror/", dependencies = TRUE)
#install.packages("knitr", repos = "https://packages.sde.digital.nhs.uk/repository/cran-mirror/", dependencies = TRUE)
#install.packages("kableExtra", repos = "https://packages.sde.digital.nhs.uk/repository/cran-mirror/", dependencies = TRUE)

#setup markdown
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

setwd("D:/PhotonUser/My Files/Home Folder/ccu075_01")

# Get cohort data
incidence_cohort_England <- read.csv2("ccu075_01_M314_cohort_20240925.csv") %>%
  mutate(Eth_modified = ifelse(Eth_grouped == "Unknown", "White", Eth_grouped))

merged <- read.csv("ccu075_01_denominators_i_age_group_sex_ethnicity_20241010.csv")

#unique(incidence_cohort_England$Eth_modified) - OK
```

### Incident cohort: crude rate ratio by ethnicity

```{r ratios}
# Set parameters for analyses
CI_level <- 0.95
rate_multiplier <- 1000000

#Compile cases and denominator dataset where age is grouped
grouped_demographics <- incidence_cohort_England %>%
  group_by(Eth_modified, sex, age_group) %>%
  summarise(cases = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  rename(ethnicity_broad = Eth_modified)

merged_grouped <- full_join(grouped_demographics, merged, by=c("ethnicity_broad", "sex", "age_group")) %>%
  mutate(cases = ifelse(is.na(cases), 0, cases))

#sum(merged_grouped$combined_denominator, na.rm=TRUE) - still OK
#sum(merged_grouped$cases) - still OK
```

### Crude odds ratios: Ethnicity

```{r incidence_odds_IMD, message=FALSE}
crude_inc_rates_by_ethnicity2 <- merged_grouped %>%
  filter(ethnicity_broad != "Unknown") %>%
  group_by(ethnicity_broad) %>%
  summarise(Cases_for_calculations = ifelse(sum(cases)>50, sum(cases), #calculates using real counts where n>50
                                            ifelse(sum(cases)>9, 5*round(sum(cases)/5,0), #calculates using counts to nearest 5 where n>9/<50
                                                   1)), #Suppresses percentage where count is less than 10 (to 1 to enable code to parse)
            Population=sum(combined_denominator)) 

crude_inc_rates_by_ethnicity2$ethnicity_broad <- factor(crude_inc_rates_by_ethnicity2$ethnicity_broad, levels=c("White", 
                                                                                                    "Asian", 
                                                                                                    "Black", 
                                                                                                    "Mixed", 
                                                                                                    "Other"))

poisson.model_ethnicity <- glm(formula = Cases_for_calculations ~ ethnicity_broad, 
                         offset = log(Population),
                         family = poisson(link="log"), 
                         data = crude_inc_rates_by_ethnicity2)

summary(poisson.model_ethnicity)

ecm <- exp(coef(poisson.model_ethnicity))
ci <- exp(confint(poisson.model_ethnicity))

collated_crude_ORs <- data.frame(rbind(c(Group = "Asian", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="Asian")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Asian"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Asian"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "Black", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="Black")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Black"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Black"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "Mixed", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="Mixed")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Mixed"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Mixed"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "White", 
                                         OR = 1, 
                                         Lower_CI = NA, 
                                         Upper_CI = NA),
                                       c(Group = "Other", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="Other")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Other"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Other"),][[2]],2))
                                 )
                           )
```

### Adjusted odds ratios: Ethnicity

```{r incidence_odds_adj, message=FALSE}
adjusted_inc_rates_by_ethnicity <- merged_grouped %>%
  filter(ethnicity_broad != "Unknown") %>%
  mutate(Cases_for_calculations = ifelse(cases == 0, 1, cases)) #Suppresses percentage where count is less than 10 (to 1 to enable code to parse)

adjusted_inc_rates_by_ethnicity$ethnicity_broad <- factor(adjusted_inc_rates_by_ethnicity$ethnicity_broad, levels=c("White", 
                                                                                                    "Asian", 
                                                                                                    "Black", 
                                                                                                    "Mixed", 
                                                                                                    "Other"))

poisson.model_ethnicity2 <- glm(formula = Cases_for_calculations ~ ethnicity_broad + age_group + sex, 
                         offset = log(combined_denominator),
                         family = poisson(link="log"), 
                         data = adjusted_inc_rates_by_ethnicity)

summary(poisson.model_ethnicity2)

ecm <- exp(coef(poisson.model_ethnicity2))
ci <- exp(confint(poisson.model_ethnicity2))

collated_ORs <- data.frame(rbind(collated_crude_ORs,
                                       c(Group = "Asian*", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="Asian")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Asian"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Asian"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "Black*", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="Black")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Black"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Black"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "Mixed*", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="Mixed")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Mixed"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Mixed"),][[2]],2)),
                                       c(Group = "White*", 
                                         OR = 1, 
                                         Lower_CI = NA, 
                                         Upper_CI = NA),
                                       c(Group = "Other*", 
                                         OR = round(ecm[str_detect(names(ecm), pattern="Other")][[1]],2), 
                                         Lower_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Other"),][[1]],2), 
                                         Upper_CI = round(ci[str_detect(row.names(ci), pattern="Other"),][[2]],2))
                                 )
                           )
```

```{R export}
#Print table
collated_ORs %>%
  kable(booktabs=TRUE, align="l", col.names = c("Group", 
                       "Odds ratio", 
                       "95% CI lower bound",
                       "95% CI upper bound"))

#write.csv(collated_ORs, "ccu075_01_M314_inc_ratios_ethnicity_SA_20241016.csv")

# Contextual information
# Crude and adjusted odds ratios for incidence of Takayasu arteritis by demographic group. Sensitivity analysis where all individuals with unknown ethnicity are assumed to be White
# 
# Column 1: Ethnicity. Asterisk indicates ratios adjusted for age and sex, otherwise the estimates given are crude
# Column 2: Odds ratio of diagnosis with Takayasu arteritis within each demographic group (1 indicates reference group)
# Column 3: Poisson 95% confidence interval lower bound
# Column 4: Poisson 95% confidence interval upper bound
```

### Version

```{r version, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
